name: Hard Money Lender New York #1 NYC Manhattan Bridge Capital Inc. Real Estate Loans, Fix Flip Loans, Bridge Loans
description_short: Manhattan Bridge Capital is a hard money lender specializing in short-term, secured real estate loans for fix-and-flip projects, bridge financing, and small construction across New York and surrounding regions.
description_long:
Manhattan Bridge Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ: LOAN) operates as a private hard money lender focused exclusively on real estate investors rather than consumers. The company was established to serve professional investors seeking short-term financing solutions that traditional banks typically do not offer. Their business model centers on providing non-banking, private loans secured primarily by real estate collateral.

The company offers three core loan products: fix-and-flip loans to finance property purchases and repairs for quick resale, bridge loans for acquiring small income-producing properties, and construction loans for small new projects. They serve the New York market comprehensively, including all five NYC boroughs (Brooklyn, Queens, Bronx, Manhattan, Staten Island), Long Island (Nassau and Suffolk Counties), Hudson Valley, Rockland, and Westchester Counties. They also fund properties located in New Jersey, Connecticut, and Florida. Loans are typically structured as one-year terms with interest-only payments during the loan period and a balloon payment at maturity.

Manhattan Bridge Capital distinguishes itself through NASDAQ listing (ticker: LOAN), which provides institutional-grade oversight and transparency rare among hard money lenders. They position themselves as the "#1 Hard Money Lender in NYC" and specifically target professional real estate investors with established track records rather than novice borrowers. All loans are secured by real estate collateral and typically require personal guarantees from business principals, reducing risk.

As a hard money lender, this company primarily serves experienced investors comfortable with short-term debt structures, higher interest rates than traditional mortgages, and rapid closing timelines. Borrowers should understand that hard money loans are expensive bridge financing solutions, not primary mortgages, and are designed for investors with clear exit strategies rather than long-term homeownership.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: NASDAQ-listed company (ticker: LOAN) providing institutional oversight and transparency
Rated #1 Hard Money Lender in NYC with established market reputation
Comprehensive geographic coverage across 5 NYC boroughs plus Long Island, Hudson Valley, Westchester, Rockland, and out-of-state properties
Specialized expertise in fix-and-flip and bridge loan structures tailored to investor needs
Fast closing capability typical of hard money lenders for time-sensitive acquisitions
Real estate-secured loans reducing lender risk and enabling approval for borrowers with credit challenges
Clear loan structure with interest-only terms during loan period and defined balloon payment
cons: Hard money loans carry significantly higher interest rates than traditional mortgages, making them expensive financing
One-year loan term with balloon payment structure requires clear exit strategy or refinancing plan
Only serves professional real estate investors; not suitable for owner-occupant homebuyers or non-investor borrowers
Personal guarantees required from business principals, creating personal liability beyond real estate collateral
Website lacks specific information on interest rates, fees, loan amount ranges, or qualification criteria
best_for: Professional real estate investors executing fix-and-flip projects needing short-term acquisition and renovation financing
Experienced investors purchasing income-producing properties who need bridge financing between property sale and acquisition
Real estate developers with small construction projects unable to secure traditional construction financing
diagnosis: Manhattan Bridge Capital is exclusively designed for professional real estate investors with established track records, not consumer borrowers. The critical caveat is that hard money loans are expensive, short-term debt instruments with balloon payments—they require investors to have a clear exit strategy (property sale, refinancing, or income generation) and comfort with rates and terms significantly higher than traditional mortgages.
services: Fix-and-flip loans for property purchase and repair financing
Bridge loans for income-producing property acquisition
Hard money loans to professional real estate investors
Multi-state funding (New York, New Jersey, Connecticut, Florida properties)
Loan servicing with interest-only payment structures
Rapid loan closing for time-sensitive deals
Financing for all five NYC boroughs plus surrounding counties
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 125-10 Queens Blvd suite 13, Kew Gardens, NY 11415
